claim_boundary: Configured only; no live ingestion, validation, alerting, or production readiness claimed.

Do not promote single-source claims to validated conclusions without corroboration.
Machine translation is derived text and must remain separate from original source text.
State-media or official-claim sources require explicit bias/censorship notes and independent corroboration before alert promotion.
